text:
First, note that time zones in 1538 were not standardized as today, but for this exercise we assume modern time zone offsets.

Current known offsets:
- Australia/Sydney: AEDT (UTC+11) or AEST (UTC+10). February 26 is during AEDT (UTC+11) if DST applies (but DST was not used in 1538; however, per problem, we use modern zone rules).
- Asia/Singapore: SST (UTC+8) historically, but modern Singapore is UTC+8 year-round.

Given: 6:00 PM (18:00) on February 26, 1538 in Sydney (AEDT UTC+11).
Convert to UTC: 18:00 − 11:00 = 07:00 UTC on February 26, 1538.
Convert to Singapore (UTC+8): 07:00 + 08:00 = 15:00 on February 26, 1538.

FINAL_ANSWER: 1538-02-26 15:00
